caption: A woman with blonde-highlighted hair styled in a high bun wears black over-ear headphones and a black t-shirt featuring a white circular logo. She is positioned in a recording studio, facing slightly to the left while speaking into a professional black microphone mounted on a stand. Behind her is a yellow wall panel and a dark backdrop. To her left is a screen displaying the word "Johnson" in red text above a grayscale image. To her right, the text "BOSS TALK 101" is visible in red and white, accompanied by a small logo and the text "Boss Talk 101 Logo Placeholder". Another logo for "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" appears on the screen to her left. A sign above the screen reads "Employee Only". Across the sequence, the woman remains in a consistent position, with subtle changes in her facial expression and head posture as she speaks.
